arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Slot learns latest on forward's future, with winger reportedly in advanced negotiations to leave club
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot is yet to make an addition in the January window, but reports suggest that he will soon know the fate of one of Europe's wantaway wingers.

arts.ttl: Mega club set to make MOMENTOUS Darwin Nunez move
arts.sum: A new club is set to enter the transfer race to sign Darwin Nunez from Liverpool, according to Anfield Watch. Anfield Watch previously revealed exclusively that Darwin Nunez is a subject of interest for several Saudi Pro League clubs.

arts.ttl: Chiesa’s one-word message after first Liverpool goal, Vlahovic reacts
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa wrote Liverpool’s slogan ‘YNWA’ on Instagram after scoring his first goal for the...

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp is spotted attending first match in new role as Red Bull's head of global soccer as ex-Liverpool boss watches Paris FC after starting position this month
arts.sum: Former Liverpool manager Jurgen Klopp was in the crowd on Saturday to watch second-tier French side Paris FC as part of his new role with Red Bull.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold learned valuable lesson about Arne Slot in aftermath of Man Utd struggles
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool future remains up in the air amid interest from Real Madrid but the Reds defender might look to his manager for inspiration on how to silence the noise

arts.ttl: Arne Slot shows his true colours as Accrington Stanley boss reveals chat
arts.sum: Liverpool defeated Accrington Stanley 4-0 at Anfield in the FA Cup but the Lancashire side were able to take away positives from the clash with boss John Doolan paying tribute to Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Harvey Elliott sends Federico Chiesa message amid Liverpool exit speculation
arts.sum: Liverpool summer signing Federico Chiesa scored his first goa for the club against Accrington Stanley

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sent clear Liverpool transfer message after Khvicha Kvaratskhelia update
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news and transfer gossip as the Reds are linked with a swoop for Napoli forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia - while Manchester City are reportedly closing in on Omar Marmoush.

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez savaged by club legend after latest blank - 'He's not a Liverpool player'
arts.sum: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has been slammed by Reds legend Robbie Fowler, who has not been impressed by the former Benfica goalscorer during his time at Anfield

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans send clear Rio Ngumoha message after Liverpool gem’s debut against Accrington Stanley
arts.sum: Liverpool cruised into the fourth round of the FA Cup after beating Accrington Stanley 4-0 in Saturday’s third-round clash at Anfield. Liverpool opened the scoring...
